default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Okta and GrowthX Labs for outbound/growth initiatives and AI-powered workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rachael (Okta) seeks standalone AI tools for growth testing, avoiding integration with existing systems due to company restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide custom workflows for outbound/growth, separate from broader content/editorial work](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focus on building fundamental, repeatable processes before scaling to broader teams](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to send revised SOW with separate custom workflow proposal](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

## Topics

### Okta's Internal Growth Lab Strategy

  - [Rachael building internal growth lab as abstraction layer for testing](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Team to vet AI tools, account data, and business signals before wider adoption](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Aiming to address ROI issues in current marketing spend (e.g., unfocused direct mail)](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Focus on mastering fundamentals: "fear the man who kicks that one damn kick 10,000 times"](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

### GrowthX Labs Offering

  - [Custom AI-powered workflows for research, content generation, and outbound](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Emphasis on expert-led, curated processes rather than autonomous agents](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Infrastructure handles complex tasks (e.g., web scraping, vector DB integration)](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Avoids need for Okta to build and maintain complex systems internally](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)

### Use Case: Auth4GenAI Outreach

  - [Identify enterprises building AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Gather data: company name, AI agent name, URL, recent discussions](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Target C-suite, VPs, and directors with tailored messaging](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Test and refine approach before scaling to broader teams](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Content and Messaging Strategy

  - [May focus: B2B SaaS value props (pain, solution, customer story)](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Segment approach for enterprise, commercial, and emerging small business](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Aim to create reusable, fundamental messaging across regions](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send revised SOW with separate custom workflow proposal by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Rachael to review current SOW and new custom workflow proposal](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Rachael to share Q2 plans to inform GrowthX's proposal](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Rachael to follow up with internal stakeholders on broader content needs after QBR period](https://fathom.video/share/tzp6txqnsoM9BypsNFQtj4pXm-ed9yR9?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
